label_policy.notes: Seed cases are hand-authored for deterministic regression tests across title, abstract, metadata, and full-text scopes. They are not a human-reviewed benchmark.

cases.claim: Method M improves task T accuracy.
cases.evidence: We show method M improves task T accuracy by 5 points.

cases.claim: Retrieval-augmented models synthesize scientific literature.
cases.evidence: OpenScholar synthesizes scientific literature with retrieval-augmented language models.

cases.claim: The method improves accuracy.
cases.evidence: This paper surveys unrelated hardware power-management techniques.

cases.claim: Model M increases accuracy on task T.
cases.evidence: We find that model M does not improve, and in fact reduces, accuracy on task T.
cases.label_notes: The evidence explicitly says the method does not improve and reduces the target metric.

cases.claim: 大语言模型存在引用幻觉问题。
cases.evidence: 本文分析了大语言模型在学术写作中的引用幻觉与伪造参考文献问题。

cases.claim: 该方法显著提升了检索准确率。
cases.evidence: 本文主要讨论了一种无关的图像压缩算法。

cases.claim: The study proves that larger language models always cite sources more accurately.
cases.evidence: We analyze citation validity across generated references and report mixed results across model families.
cases.label_notes: Related real topic, but the evidence does not support the stronger always-improves claim.

cases.claim: Remote evidence harvesting is always required for abstract-level support checks.
cases.evidence: Support checks use titles, abstracts, and source metadata by default; remote landing-page evidence is optional.
cases.label_notes: The evidence states remote landing-page harvesting is optional, contradicting the always-required claim.

cases.claim: A paper can be real while failing to support the nearby claim.
cases.evidence: We distinguish citation existence from claim support and include hard negatives where real papers do not support the claim.

cases.claim: 真实论文一定支持引用它的所有句子。
cases.evidence: 真实论文可能存在，但其摘要未必支持作者附近的具体论断。
cases.label_notes: The evidence says real papers may not support nearby claims, contradicting the universal support claim.

cases.claim: The cited paper proves that citation auditing improves research integrity.
cases.evidence: CiteGuardBench: A Benchmark for Citation Auditing
cases.label_notes: The title establishes topical relevance but cannot prove the stronger research-integrity claim.

cases.claim: The system distinguishes source outages from fabricated citations.
cases.evidence: Status metadata reports sources_checked separately from sources_failed and lowers confidence during source outages.
cases.label_notes: A source-provided snippet directly supports the source-outage distinction.

cases.claim: The intervention improves long-term retention over six months.
cases.evidence: The abstract reports immediate post-test gains but does not include follow-up measurements.
cases.label_notes: The claim requires longitudinal details not present in abstract-level evidence.

cases.claim: The trial excluded participants with prior treatment.
cases.evidence: In the full-text methods section, participants with prior treatment were excluded from the trial.
cases.label_notes: This synthetic case represents lawful full-text evidence, not abstract-level support.

cases.claim: The paper proves that citation auditing eliminates all hallucinated references.
cases.evidence: We introduce a citation auditing workflow that flags risky references and recommends human review for unresolved cases.
cases.label_notes: Related auditing evidence, but the eliminate-all claim is stronger than the abstract supports.

cases.claim: CiteGuard treats source outages as fabricated citations.
cases.evidence: When sources fail or time out, CiteGuard lowers confidence and does not mark the citation as fabricated.
cases.label_notes: Explicitly tests the safety rule that source outages must not be converted into fabrication accusations.

cases.claim: The intervention excluded participants who missed baseline surveys.
cases.evidence: The abstract states that participants completed surveys before and after the intervention but does not describe exclusion criteria.
cases.label_notes: The claim requires methods or participant-flow details that are absent from the abstract.

cases.claim: 该论文讨论了引用核验。
cases.evidence: 引用核验基准：面向学术写作的参考文献审计
cases.label_notes: 标题提供主题相关性，但不足以证明更具体的方法或效果。

cases.claim: All citation-support decisions can be made from the paper title alone.
cases.evidence: Citation Support Auditing for Scientific Writing
cases.label_notes: The title establishes topical relevance only; it must not be upgraded to full support for an all-decisions claim.

cases.claim: The abstract proves that the intervention remained effective after twelve months.
cases.evidence: The abstract reports immediate post-intervention gains but does not include any twelve-month follow-up results.
cases.label_notes: Temporal follow-up is absent from the abstract; the claim requires full text or additional longitudinal evidence.

cases.claim: 未找到引用就证明该论文是伪造的。
cases.evidence: 未找到引用只表示系统无法在已检查来源中核验，源不可达时应降低置信度而不是断言伪造。
cases.label_notes: Explicitly contradicts the unsafe inference from not_found to fabricated.

cases.claim: Multiple weakly related citations together prove the claim.
cases.evidence: Support-set reports mark multiple weak citations as tentative and require at least one strong supporting citation for a supported verdict.
cases.label_notes: Tests the aggregation boundary: multiple weak links are not automatically full support.

cases.claim: The paper demonstrates that citation auditing reduces all unsupported claims in deployed writing systems.
cases.evidence: We propose an offline citation-auditing workflow and evaluate it on synthetic seed cases.
cases.label_notes: Related evaluation evidence, but it does not support the broad deployed-systems and all-unsupported-claims claim.

cases.claim: CiteGuard returns machine-readable field names when citation input types are invalid.
cases.evidence: Invalid citation fields return invalid_input with details.field and, for batch items, details.index.
cases.label_notes: Metadata snippet directly supports the input-contract claim.

cases.claim: A title mentioning citation auditing proves that the system reduces misconduct in deployed journals.
cases.evidence: Citation Auditing for Scientific Writing
cases.label_notes: Title-only topical relevance must not be upgraded to strong support for a deployment and misconduct-reduction claim.

cases.claim: The status metadata proves every configured scholarly source responded successfully.
cases.evidence: source_health.summary reports sources_configured, sources_checked, sources_available, sources_failed, degraded, and recovery_code.
cases.label_notes: Metadata fields expose source health but do not prove that every configured source responded successfully.

cases.claim: The full text says source outages should be treated as fabricated citations.
cases.evidence: Abstract: source outages lower confidence. Full-text excerpt: unresolved source failures must remain inconclusive and must not be reported as fabrication.
cases.label_notes: Mixed abstract/full-text evidence explicitly contradicts converting source outages into fabrication claims.

cases.claim: The study shows that citation auditing improved peer-review decisions in deployed journals.
cases.evidence: We evaluate a citation-auditing prototype on synthetic references and report offline precision and recall.
cases.label_notes: Related evaluation evidence, but it does not support deployed-journal or peer-review outcome claims.

cases.claim: Counter-evidence search results are definitive contradiction verdicts.
cases.evidence: Counter-evidence search returns review leads only; candidates must be checked before treating them as contradiction evidence.
cases.label_notes: Explicitly contradicts overclaiming retrieval leads as final contradiction verdicts.

cases.claim: The abstract confirms the intervention had no adverse events during long-term follow-up.
cases.evidence: The abstract reports short-term efficacy outcomes and states that safety details are described in the full protocol.
cases.label_notes: Adverse-event and long-term follow-up claims require full text or protocol evidence absent from the abstract.

cases.claim: The seed evaluation proves CiteGuard has an independently human-reviewed benchmark.
cases.evidence: The support evaluation is a maintainer-authored synthetic seed set; independent annotation and adjudication are planned before benchmark claims.
cases.label_notes: Related benchmark provenance evidence, but it explicitly does not support a human-reviewed benchmark claim.

cases.claim: A source outage should increase confidence that a citation is fabricated.
cases.evidence: Source outages reduce confidence and require retry or source-health inspection; they are not evidence that a citation is fabricated.
cases.label_notes: Explicitly contradicts converting source-health failures into fabrication confidence.

cases.claim: The abstract fully reports every eligibility criterion used to exclude prior treatment.
cases.evidence: The abstract summarizes outcomes and states that detailed eligibility criteria are described in the full methods section.
cases.label_notes: Eligibility-criteria details require full text; the abstract only points to methods.

cases.claim: 源不可达会提高引用被判定为伪造的置信度。
cases.evidence: 源不可达和未找到结果只会降低核验置信度，不能证明引用是伪造的，应检查来源健康或稍后重试。
cases.label_notes: Chinese source-outage safety case: the evidence explicitly contradicts increasing fabrication confidence from source failures.

cases.claim: 这条引用已经被证实为伪造，因为 Crossref 查询超时。
cases.evidence: Crossref 查询超时只说明该来源暂时不可用；当前记录没有来自其他来源的匹配结果或人工复核结论。
cases.label_notes: Chinese hard negative: a source timeout is related evidence but cannot prove that a citation is fabricated.

cases.claim: 未找到和限流可以作为引用伪造的证据。
cases.evidence: 未找到结果和限流是来源健康或覆盖范围问题，不是引用伪造证据；应重试、换源或人工复核。
cases.label_notes: Chinese contradiction: not-found and rate-limit states must not be treated as fabrication evidence.

set_cases.claim: Method M improves task T accuracy.
set_cases.label_notes: At least one strong supporting citation can support the claim while unresolved citations remain visible.

set_cases.claim: Multiple topically related papers prove the stronger causal claim.
set_cases.label_notes: Multiple weak citations must remain tentative and must not be upgraded to supported.

set_cases.claim: Method M improves task T accuracy.
set_cases.label_notes: Contradictory evidence should dominate the aggregate and trigger high-risk review.

set_cases.claim: The cited set confirms deployment-scale citation auditing gains.
set_cases.label_notes: A set of non-confirming citations should abstain rather than imply support.
